prompt: Using the provided reference image, recreate the same retro game-cover composition as a polished 4K cinematic remake. Keep the large "ROLO TO THE RESCUE" title at the top, the horizontal framed key art layout, the jungle setting, and the lineup of 5 characters in the same left-to-right order: beaver in the water, squirrel on the bank, elephant in the center, blue rabbit, and mole emerging from a dirt mound with a miner helmet. Transform all 5 characters into cute semi-realistic 3D animated creatures with natural fur, skin, and soft stylization, while preserving their recognizable proportions and the nostalgic feel of the original cover. Clean up the composition so it looks like premium modern game promotional art, with warm golden-hour jungle lighting, richer depth, more realistic vegetation and water reflections, and a refined wooden frame. Remove any blurred or obscured facial areas and fully render every character clearly. Make the image wide, high-detail, family-friendly, and faithful to the original cover while feeling like a modern realistic remaster.
